modinfo "0w\xaf\f\x92t\b\x02A\xe1\xc1\a\xe6\xd6\x18\xe6path\tgithub.com/docker/docker/cmd/docker-proxy\nmod\tgithub.com/docker/docker\t(devel)\t\ndep\tgithub.com/containerd/log\tv0.1.0\t\ndep\tgithub.com/ishidawataru/sctp\tv0.0.0-20230406120618-7ff4192f6ff2\t\ndep\tgithub.com/sirupsen/logrus\tv1.9.3\t\ndep\tgolang.org/x/net\tv0.39.0\t\ndep\tgolang.org/x/sys\tv0.32.0\t\nbuild\t-buildmode=pie\nbuild\t-compiler=gc\nbuild\t-ldflags=\"-w -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.Version=28.2.2\\\" -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.GitCommit=45873be4ae3f5488c9498b3d9f17deaddaf609f4\\\" -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.BuildTime=2026-02-04T10:38:46.000000000+00:00\\\" -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.PlatformName=\\\" -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.ProductName=\\\" -X \\\"github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.DefaultProductLicense=\\\"   \"\nbuild\t-tags=exclude_graphdriver_btrfs,seccomp\nbuild\tDefaultGODEBUG=containermaxprocs=0,decoratemappings=0,gotestjsonbuildtext=1,httpcookiemaxnum=0,multipathtcp=0,randseednop=0,rsa1024min=0,tlsmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,x509rsacrt=0,x509sha256skid=0,x509usepolicies=0\nbuild\tCGO_ENABLED=1\nbuild\tCGO_CFLAGS=\"-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fomit-frame-pointer -pipe -I/usr/include\"\nbuild\tCGO_CPPFLAGS=\nbuild\tCGO_CXXFLAGS=\"-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fomit-frame-pointer -pipe\"\nbuild\tCGO_LDFLAGS=\"-Wl,-O1 -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -L/usr/lib64\"\nbuild\tGOARCH=amd64\nbuild\tGOEXPERIMENT=nodwarf5\nbuild\tGOOS=linux\nbuild\tGOAMD64=v1\n\xf92C1\x86\x18 r\x00\x82B\x10A\x16\xd8\xf2"
EOF
mkdir -p $WORK/b001/exe/
cd .
GOROOT='/usr/lib/go' /usr/lib/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64/link -o $WORK/b001/exe/a.out -importcfg $WORK/b001/importcfg.link -installsuffix shared -X=runtime.godebugDefault=containermaxprocs=0,decoratemappings=0,gotestjsonbuildtext=1,httpcookiemaxnum=0,multipathtcp=0,randseednop=0,rsa1024min=0,tlsmlkem=0,tlssha1=1,updatemaxprocs=0,x509rsacrt=0,x509sha256skid=0,x509usepolicies=0 -buildmode=pie -buildid=30_5-0G-SlrEIpC8a-6r/4oIlu4FUM3B0O36Qjo96/YQzvDkWYRA1Kvy9IAYCh/30_5-0G-SlrEIpC8a-6r -w -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.Version=28.2.2 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.GitCommit=45873be4ae3f5488c9498b3d9f17deaddaf609f4 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.BuildTime=2026-02-04T10:38:46.000000000+00:00 -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.PlatformName= -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.ProductName= -X github.com/docker/docker/dockerversion.DefaultProductLicense= -extld=x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc $WORK/b001/_pkg_.a
go tool buildid -w $WORK/b001/exe/a.out # internal
mkdir -p bundles/dynbinary-daemon/
cp $WORK/b001/exe/a.out bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy
rm -rf $WORK/b001/
Created binary: bundles/dynbinary-daemon/docker-proxy

make -j2 
mkdir man8
/usr/bin/go-md2man -in dockerd.8.md -out man8/dockerd.8

  [ ok ]
  [ ok ]
 * 
 * To use Docker, the Docker daemon must be running as root. To automatically
 * start the Docker daemon at boot:
 *   rc-update add docker default
 * 
 * To use Docker as a non-root user, add yourself to the 'docker' group:
 *   usermod -aG docker <youruser>
 * 
 * Install additional packages for optional runtime features:
 *   sys-apps/rootlesskit for rootless mode support
 * for rootless mode you also need a network stack
 *   app-containers/slirp4netns for rootless mode network stack
